<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Logical; use Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Abstract\AbstractMutator; use PhpParser\Node; use PhpParser\Node\Expr\BinaryOp\LogicalAnd; use PhpParser\Node\Expr\BinaryOp\LogicalOr; class LogicalOrToLogicalAnd extends AbstractMutator { public const SET = 'Logical'; public const DESCRIPTION = 'Converts the logical or operator to the logical and operator.'; public const DIFF = <<<'DIFF' if ($a || $b) { // [tl! remove] if ($a && $b) { // [tl! add] // ... } DIFF; public static function nodesToHandle(): array { return [LogicalOr::class]; } public static function mutate(Node $node): Node { /** @var LogicalOr $node */ return new LogicalAnd($node->left, $node->right); } }
